response.original_title: 1-(866)-216-0631  How do I recover my Zengo wallet account?
response.overview: Recovering your Zengo account requires three elements: the original email address you used to create the account, the secure Recovery File stored in your cloud storage, and a successful 3D FaceLock biometric scan.   Step-by-Step Recovery Process Download the App: Reinstall the Zengo app on your mobile device Apple App Store or Google Play Store.  Sync Cloud Storage: Make sure your mobile device is actively signed in to the exact same Apple ID, Google Drive, or Dropbox account that you used to initially create your wallet.  Enter Your Email: Open the Zengo app, tap "Get Started," and enter the exact same email address used to create your original wallet.
response.title: 1-(866)-216-0631  How do I recover my Zengo wallet account?
